raw_consumer_statement:
I have written several times to resolve this dispute in my favor. I did not make this purchase, therefore the only information I have are my monthly statements, which I have submitted multiple times showing that the charge did not post until 5 months after the transaction date. Home Depot Customer Service, HomedepotXXXX, and Citibank have not tried to resolve this matter. This fraudulent transaction was posted on my statement in XXXX of XXXX, and is listed as follows : Trans Date Description Reference # Amount XX/XX/XXXX Home Depot.com XXXX XXXX {$2900.00} The original statement had the charge duplicated, they have removed the duplicate charge, but are still billing me for the amount stated above. No purchase was made by me from HomedepotXXXX, I called immediately after receiving my statement to dispute the charges. I was told a new card would be issued and the charge would be looked into and reversed. I was not provided with additional instructions because my card was not lost or stolen. It was in my possession, and I did not give anyone else permission to use the card to make purchases. 

To date, the issue still has not been resolved despite my many phone calls and written letters. Please review credit card statements from XX/XX/XXXX through XX/XX/XXXX XXXX
